name: Varunprasaath R. Selvaraju, Ph.D.
summary: PhD Chemist with 6+ years of experience in analytical chemistry, quality control, and materials testing. Expertise in FT-IR spectroscopy, thermal analysis (TGA, DSC), GC-MS, and method development for petroleum and chemical analysis. Strong background in statistical process control (SPC), developing analytical methods, and establishing quality control protocols. Experienced in laboratory operations management and ensuring data integrity for analytical testing.

education.degree: B.S. (Research), Major: Chemistry; Minor: Materials Science

bullets: Develop and validate analytical methods using FT-IR, thermal analysis, and chromatographic techniques.
Apply statistical process control methods to ensure quality and reproducibility of analytical data.
Conducted comprehensive materials characterization using FT-IR, TGA, DSC, GC-MS, and LC-MS.
Developed and documented analytical methods and SOPs for quality control testing.
Managed QC laboratory operations including instrument calibration, maintenance, and compliance.
Implemented SOPs and quality control protocols ensuring data integrity.

skills.Analytical Techniques: FT-IR, TGA, DSC, GC-MS, LC-MS, HPLC, UV-Vis, NMR
skills.Quality Control: QC testing, method development, SOP creation, statistical process control
skills.Laboratory Operations: Instrument calibration, maintenance, compliance, data integrity
